name: Brussels Sprouts Souffle
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Grated Onions, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the sprouts, drain, and chop them.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan and add flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Gradually add milk and onion, stirring until thickened.
4. Beat egg yolks and stir into the warm sauce.
5. Add cheese and cook for one minute, stirring constantly.
6. Mix in chopped sprouts and remove from heat.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the hot mixture.
8. Transfer to an ungreased 2-quart souffle dish.
9. Bake at 300°F for 1 1/2 hours and serve immediately.
Serves: 4 to 6
